title: LiveMarketDataPlane Implementation Decision Gate

decisions.brief: Proposed provider is Longbridge OpenAPI with startup entitlement probe; pending user confirmation
Proposed first scope is US equities TSLA.US, NVDA.US, AAPL.US, QQQ.US, SPY.US during regular trading hours; pending user confirmation
Proposed storage is dedicated M2 tables in data/market_intel.db; pending user confirmation
Proposed retention is 7 trading days for normalized quote/depth/trade facts and 30 calendar days for derived artifacts; pending user confirmation
Proposed operator inspection is backend read APIs plus CLI first; pending user confirmation
Proposed readiness thresholds separate tolerant analysis monitoring from stricter paper/shadow readiness; pending user confirmation
Proposed fallback policy forbids silent live fallback and requires explicit degraded/replay labels; pending user confirmation
M2 remains read-only and excludes PaperTradingEngine, RiskGate, orders, positions, PnL, broker/account, and live trading; pending user confirmation

acceptance.check: Gate lists every M2 implementation decision that blocks coding
Provider capability statements cite official Longbridge quote docs and remain separated from entitlement assumptions
Recommendations are marked pending user confirmation, not confirmed
Gate blocks provider adapters, storage migrations, streams, CLI/API work, and execution simulation until user confirmation
Backlog, roadmap, task index, and workflow README point to the decision gate

non_goals: provider SDK or API client changes
account, order, position, PnL, or fill behavior

verification.command: Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 .agent-dev/specs/live-market-data-plane-implementation-decision-gate/spec.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 .agent-dev/specs/live-market-data-plane-implementation-decision-gate/decision-record.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 .agent-dev/specs/live-market-data-plane-implementation-decision-gate/clarification-questions.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 .agent-dev/tasks/T016-live-market-data-plane-implementation-decision-gate.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null
verification.expect: T016 spec, decision, clarification, and task JSON files parse

verification.command: rg -n "LiveMarketDataPlane Implementation Decision Gate|implementation decision gate|D501|pending_user_confirmation|Longbridge|provider_fallback" .agent-dev/specs/live-market-data-plane-implementation-decision-gate .agent-dev/tasks/T016-live-market-data-plane-implementation-decision-gate.md project-docs/backlog apps/trader-workflows/README.md apps/trader-workflows/README.zh-CN.md
verification.expect: T016 decision gate terms are discoverable from source docs, workflow docs, and task/spec artifacts
No whitespace errors in T016 planning artifacts
